candidate_llm_application: LLM agent task-routing optimized via Physarum-style tube-thickening: edge weights between agents adjust based on task-flow, recovering near-optimal routing without explicit graph algorithms.

results.title: Slime-Mold-Inspired Routing in Multi-Agent Systems
